label: Storytelling
description: Lead with narrative tension, then turn the story into a memorable lesson listeners can carry forward.
bestFor: Narrative solo shows, personal stories, and emotionally resonant teaching.
promptHint: Use scenes, tension, and a clear emotional turn before landing the lesson and takeaway.
exampleTitle: The Episode That Taught Me Structure Matters More Than Talent
exampleDescription: Open with a real moment, build tension, and turn the story into a clear practical insight.
